title: Black Bean Lentil Salad with Cumin Lime Dressing
instructions: Cook lentils according to package directions or use 1 cup cooked lentils
While lentils are cooking, combine lime juice, Dijon mustard, garlic, cumin, and oregano in a small bowl and whisk to combine then set aside
Finely dice the bell pepper, cucumber, spinach, onion, and tomatoes and roughly chop the cilantro
In a large bowl combine black beans, lentils, and chopped vegetables then add the dressing and toss to combine
Serve immediately or chill covered in the fridge for at least an hour to let the flavors combine
